source_pr.title: util/logutil: migrate to testify
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #26154 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed: Removed `pingcap/check` for `utils/logutil`, moved to testify.

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note<!-- Please write a release note here to describe the change you made when it is released to the users of TiDB. If your PR doesn't involve any change to TiDB(like test enhancements, RFC proposals...), you can write `No release note`. -->

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: …which causes data race.

evidence: files: util/logutil/hex_2_test.go, util/logutil/hex_test.go, util/logutil/log_2_test.go, util/logutil/log_test.go, util/logutil/main_test.go
